raw_consumer_statement: I ordered a riding lawnmower online from Home Depot approximately XX/XX/year>. I received the riding lawnmower on XX/XX/year>. Home Depot refuses to remove crate. There are no instructions. Home Depot stated just have a couple male friends over and they will know what to do. REALLY. They did not know what to do and could believe Home Depot refuses to remove it. Nobody so far knows how to remove it. I can not use it. Home Depot can remove the crate or issue me a credit of {$2200.00}
